expo.name: HIM - Her Intelligent Mate | Period Tracker & Cycle Companion

web.name: HIM - Her Intelligent Mate | Free Period Tracker & Menstrual Cycle Companion for Women
web.description: HIM (Her Intelligent Mate) is the #1 AI-powered period tracker, menstrual cycle companion, and women's health app. Track your period, predict cycles, log moods, and get empathetic AI support through every phase. Free feminine wellness tool for women, girls, and anyone who menstruates.
